visual_description: Three young men in dark clothing are in a dimly lit, cluttered room. The man in the center with platinum blonde hair points a wand forward, flanked by two other men who also hold wands and look forward with focused expressions. The scene is tense, suggesting a confrontation is about to take place.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a hushed, urgent tone, followed by a sharp, high-pitched electronic sound.
